name: Mango-Coconut Pie with Mango Coulis
recipeIngredient: Toasted coconut flakes (12 cup), divided, plus extra for garnish
Mango coulis: 2 cups mango cubes, 1/2 cup sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and 1 cup coconut flakes in a pie tin. Press into shape and bake for 8 minutes. Set aside to cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolks, cornstarch, and half the sugar.
4. In a saucepan, combine milk, remaining sugar, coconut cream, and vanilla bean. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to very low. Gradually add 1/2 cup of the hot milk mixture into the egg mixture, whisking constantly to temper the eggs.
6. Once the bowl's bottom is warm to touch, pour the egg mixture back into the saucepan, whisking continuously.
7. Cook until thickened to mayonnaise consistency. Strain through a fine sieve over another bowl of ice water. Allow cooling thoroughly.
8. Stir in diced mango and remaining coconut flakes. Pour into crust and chill to set.
9. Top with sweetened whipped cream and garnish with extra coconut. Serve with Mango Coulis.
Mango Coulis: Combine mango cubes and sugar in a blender until smooth. Add enough water for a pourable sauce. Yield: About 2 1/2 cups.
